programme.title: Chilgam
programme.desc: A story of love and courage that strives to sustain amidst a communally-charged environment.

programme.title: Pravaah The Flow
programme.desc: This story is about this Nature photographer Shivoham. Through his travel, he likes to explore and capture wonderful, breath taking creations of nature and places. But how can a journey be complete, without interesting escapades? 5 different locations, 5 different interactions revealing the darkest secrets, depth of life, deep hidden emotions and finally, ending the journey with an experience that leaves him all rejuvenated…as if he had a new birth and gets him all set for the next one.

programme.title: Gutargu
programme.desc: Gutargu is a romantic Hindi short story about a guy a girl who admire each other, and are falling for each other secretly. Their unusual love story takes place on a rooftop. Will their love story have a happy ending?

programme.title: Horror Chapters
programme.desc: Many horror events, interaction with super natural possibilities. Exploring the Paranormal

programme.title: Kamera
programme.desc: He is a 12 years old boy, who works in a garbage dump and lives in the slum along with his mother. Both have different ideologies towards life. He is a staunch believer of being positive and has a dream of spreading smiles. But, his mother is a frustrated woman. While working, he finds a digital camera in the dump. His friend tells him that people smile whenever you point it towards them. He soon realizes the same and gets all thrilled to spread smiles including his mother. Unfortunately, the camera gets lost and all his dreams get shattered. What happens next is the core of the film. The story revolves around the perception of a small kid who wants to follow his dreams.

programme.title: Hearts Awash In Sapphire Light
programme.desc: Hearts Awash in Sapphire Light unfolds the tale of two individuals who encounter each other one evening, initially under less-than-ideal circumstances. At first, they engage in petty arguments over trivial matters. However, as time passes, the undeniable power of their connection becomes evident, serving as a poignant reminder that sometimes, the most extraordinary journeys take place within the depths of our own hearts.

programme.title: Holding Back
programme.desc: Short Film Holding back a short film is based on a true incident in 1999, of Shiva, a young man suffering from blood cancer and who, unfortunately, passed away during the journey while traveling by train from Bangalore to Chennai, for a friend’s marriage. Shiva was traveling with his mom and elder cousin Suresh. This film deals with the mother’s emotional journey of her son’s death. The pivotal character- Mother, is played by the national award winner Seema Biswas, popularly known for her role in and as the Bandit Queen; while Father is played by national award-winning director-writer Ananth Mahadevan; Coolie is played by Aditya Lakhia (Kachra) of Lagaan fame; Cousin brother is played by Raj Arjun, main lead in Shabri and Kaalo, Shiva, the son is played by Kunal Kumar with supporting roles played by Marathi theatre and film veterans, Pradeep Patwardhan and Jaywanth Wadekar. Background score is to be given by Anurag Saikia, the national award winner for the music of Yugadrashta in 2014. The camerawork is done by Pushpank Gawade who won the best award for Cinematography for the film Kaalo in South Africa film festival 2012.

programme.title: Hum Types
programme.desc: Charu, a girl from high society, faces her own struggles. One night, she meets Makrand, a boy from a low social class. Initially, their class difference creates a barrier, but as they spend time together, Charu realizes they share more similarities than differences. Through moments of vulnerability and connection, they discover their common humanity.

programme.title: Girgit
programme.desc: The film is an adaptation of Anton Chekhov's short story Chameleon. It tells a cheeky tale of injustice and corruption exposing the insincerity of public officials and selfish interests that aggravate or subdue their actions.

programme.title: Kajal
programme.desc: Like all elements, humans have a saturation point. What happens when a woman a constantly bullied by her boss, harassed by strangers and abused by her husband finds an abandoned package one night? A package that holds an answer to all her demons. A package that triggers an inner change in her the moment that she lays eyes on it. Kohl captures a turning point in the life of a woman, in a world claimed by men.

programme.title: Hey Listen!
programme.desc: After a few years of their breakup, Dhruv and Vidya finally got in touch with each other and decide to meet at the same place they used to hang out. All the memories were flashed, which lead them into a huge fight mixed with a lot of emotions that were buried within them years ago, and follows into an open end to the story.

programme.title: Abnormal
programme.desc: This is the tale of a mother who grapples with societal challenges due to her transgender son. She confronts opposition from her family and the broader community, yet resolves to safeguard her child's future. Eventually, she triumphs in establishing their identity within society.

programme.title: Jale Tere Honth
programme.desc: A young couple on their first date with the excitement of their first kiss does not find a private moment in the crowded city of Mumbai. Do they finally manage to experience that magical moment?

programme.title: Humari Khushboo
programme.desc: Khushboo a beautiful, young smart girl of 24 years has a medical condition that is associated with a social taboo, and her confidence is shattered when she ruins a Project Presentation in front of a prestigious and renowned client in her office. How she regains her lost confidence and fights against a social taboo, is the sort of stance HUMARI KHUSHBOO will take.

programme.title: Ghar
programme.desc: Isaac, a 15-year-old boy, is trapped in the trauma of his parents' separation, leading him to lose his passion for music. His grandmother advises him to revisit his passion and meet Naomi, a retired singer. How he finds beauty in his brokenness, follows the crux of the story.

programme.title: Keep Punching
programme.desc: Prior to realising her dream of representing the country, withdrawn boxer Kirnay must first fight the battle for her freedom outside the ring.

programme.title: The Friend To Die For
programme.desc: Can the girl survive, despite being abducted by a mentally unstable kidnapper whom society perceives as a serial killer? The truth may reveal a different story than what is commonly believed.

programme.title: Jaane Do Mujhe
programme.desc: Nisha is enjoying her date with Aditya, who was set up by her friends. While Aditya is in the washroom, Nisha hears a loud thud and rushes to check on him. She finds Aditya lying unconscious on the floor. Nisha contacts her friend Priya to inform her about the incident. However, Priya tries to reassure Nisha that it's all in her head and there's nothing to worry about. This raises the question of whether Aditya is still alive or if he exists solely in Nisha's imagination.

programme.title: French Date
programme.desc: Promila, a beautiful but lonely woman in a busy city, frequently on internet dating sites, meets Arun who's also stricken with a singlehood status for his whole life. As they both decide to spend some casual time together one evening. French Date, at first feels like a normal romantic story, which it is, but soon the viewer realizes something is different. The short film shall keep the grey matter in your brain active and you might find yourself on the edge of your seat.

programme.title: Kartavya
programme.desc: Aditi, once carefree, transforms into a responsible caregiver when her father suffers a paralysis stroke. Her newfound maturity surprises her mother. Six months later, as her parents suggest marriage, Aditi insists on finding a partner who accepts her and her parents. Will she find such a person in today's world?

programme.title: Freedom
programme.desc: Freedom is based on the lives of three women. All of them are going through the difficult challenges, which is made by society and their own family members. Despite living in democratic society lots of women still do not have permission to follow their passion or choose their carrier.

programme.title: Fried
programme.desc: In Mumbai, newlyweds Tanya and Rajat struggle after she loses her job. As financial strain and depression take a toll, their love is tested. An emotional journey of resilience, love, and the hidden impact of corporate layoffs on relationships.

programme.title: I Am Brampton
programme.desc: A city which never receives the credit it deserves, but comforts many new immigrants, with open arms

programme.title: Juwaa
programme.desc: Tillu, a struggling villager, gambles his wife's mangalsutra for a shot at change. Against the odds, he wins—but discovers the real gamble is just beginning. A tale of hope, sacrifice, and the unexpected twists of life.

programme.title: Haseen Rahasya
programme.desc: Raj, an AI engineer, has built an AI house operator Jyoti. Raj goes on a date with Sara. Sara, a chemistry teacher already having the experience of real- world experience, is icing on the cake. Everything goes smoothly. But the fun turns into fear when Jyoti says "Run to save yourself". Sara's talk with Jyoti turns the fairytale into a nightmare. What will Sara do to save her life?

programme.title: Loha Chor
programme.desc: A modest family from Haryana relocated to Dhanbad, Bihar, and took up residence in a government quarter that had previously been inhabited by the notorious "Loha Chor" gang during the 1980s in Bihar. The family encountered numerous challenges and social difficulties from both the local neighbourhood inhabitants and the remnants of the Loha Chor gang. Subsequently, law enforcement authorities conducted a raid on the premises. Through determination and courage, both the family and the protagonist of this story effectively navigated the situation in order to resolve the issue and find a resolution.

programme.title: Inphlembul
programme.desc: When two shady transport guys bicker over how dangerous their delivery consignment could be, they end up challenging each other’s a logic, knowledge, and sense of culture and language.

programme.title: Hmm
programme.desc: It all begins at a midnight bus stop, where a girl finds herself unsettled due to a stranger boy's attempts to comfort his girlfriend over a phone call. When his efforts prove unsuccessful, he starts conversing with the girl instead. Despite her apparent reluctance to engage, the boy persists in his conversation, much like a bee unwilling to leave a flower. As the night unfolds, these two unfamiliar individuals end up walking home together. Along the way, they delve into profound discussions about love and relationships. The culmination arrives in a meticulously orchestrated surprise, adding a climactic twist to their journey.

programme.title: Happily Married Part 2
programme.desc: Rani & Animesh, a couple who is having an affair with Jimmy plan to meet him on Saturday. The story unfolds as their meeting with Jimmy doesn’t go as planned.

programme.title: Raah
programme.desc: Raah is an exploration of the several stages of struggle when one steps out to pursue a dream. Sahir lives in Mumbai city with his family. The emotional and poetic narrative explores his faith, kinship and his struggle to establish himself as a poet/writer.

programme.title: Saas
programme.desc: After the death of a loved one, young Yatin takes on the responsibility of caring for his ailing mother-in-law. As he prioritizes her well-being, he faces numerous hardships, intertwining their lives unexpectedly.

programme.title: Arjun
programme.desc: Arjun is a soldier who works more like a mercenary in a never-ending war. He willfully follows the brutal orders of his commanding officer until one day, his entire world turns upside down. Examining one soldier's journey toward redemption, we show that our shared humanity is always worth fighting for underneath the trappings of all that divides us.

programme.title: Pendulum
programme.desc: After losing his fiancée, Vishu is drowning in grief, unable to see a way forward. On the verge of giving up, a mysterious encounter changes everything, offering him a new perspective on life. Will he embrace the second chance fate has given him?

programme.title: Make Her Happy
programme.desc: Nandita and Rahul are to be married soon. They are a live-in couple. Things take a U-turn when Rahul gets a call from his ex-girlfriend 'Suhana'. Will Rahul be able to save himself? Watch to find out who has trapped whom.

programme.title: Signature
programme.desc: A single mother, living in a small village, takes care of her little daughter’s educational expenses by doing tailoring work. One day, she receives a pension letter, for which she has to visit the Gramin bank. There, she encounters something unexpected.

programme.title: Oh My Star Wife
programme.desc: Story of a young married actress struggling with societal pressure over her fashion choices. Her husband's disapproval leads to arguments and a dilemma regarding societal acceptance. Ultimately, an unexpected accident brings resolution. Watch to explore how the protagonist navigates through societal expectations and challenges in her personal life.

programme.title: O Re Saajan
programme.desc: Sajan Tiwari', in his mid 30s, works as a small time estate agent in Lucknow. He is involved in an extra-marital affair. His only son, 5 year old 'Bunty', catches him in the act. Scared out of his wits, 'Sajan' makes every possible effort to stop 'Bunty' breaking the news to his wife 'Manju'. The story is a humorous take on small town life, relationships and family.

programme.title: Sizzle Of Shadows
programme.desc: A doctor encounters a couple suffering from Dementia, and attempts to alleviate their condition. Upon receiving a call from the couple's son who lives in America, the doctor visits their home and is shocked to find the couple arguing and displaying symptoms of Dementia. The doctor diagnoses the woman with Lewy bodies Dementia, which causes visual hallucinations.

programme.title: Maggi
programme.desc: How a delivery guy gets entangled in a game orchestrated by a mysterious woman, leaving him questioning her true intentions.

programme.title: On The Spot
programme.desc: On a fateful day, Parul hails a taxi to visit her boyfriend Ansh. Ansh, eagerly anticipating her arrival, is thrown into restlessness. However, their journey takes an unexpected turn when the taxi driver receives news of his daughter falling ill. Witnessing this, Parul's compassionate response sparks anger in Ansh. Yet, in the face of adversity, Parul's decision unfolds, offering inspiration to the youth. This is the tale of "On the Spot."

programme.title: Rishtey
programme.desc: Ria, a rising model, and Juhi, a top creative director, share an unbreakable bond—until ace photographer Vicky enters their lives. As passion and ambition collide, their friendship is put to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Ramdeen (now & Then)
programme.desc: This is a story based on the deep-rooted stance of feudalism in two chosen timelines; 1965 and present-day respectively. The protagonist Ramesh, is a skinny, middle-aged man who works as an office boy at a production house, despite having a mundane and monotonous lifestyle he is very kind, well-spoken, and calm by nature. The stories of Ramdin and Ramesh unravel back and forth and give us a compelling idea about how instilled the concept of feudalism is, in societies new and old.

programme.title: Paath
programme.desc: In a remote village, the seed of hope and freedom is planted in the heart of a girl. Her simple dreams are shattered when a proposal arrives, but not as a promise of love

programme.title: Prioritize Family
programme.desc: In this narrative, we follow the journey of a man who didn't treat his wife kindly. His work often invaded their home, and one day, he even invited his secretary over. Unhappy with this, his wife goes missing the next morning, making him realize her true value. Will she return? Tune in to discover the outcome.

programme.title: Panch Hazar
programme.desc: A young boy sneaks into a restricted area frequented by couples and men. He climbs the stairs, enters a room, and meets a beautiful girl. She asks him to close the door and confirm his payment. Their ensuing conversation serves as an eye-opener for men who mistreat their wives.

programme.title: Share Baazaar
programme.desc: A satirical mockumentary that dives into the wild world of stock markets, where retail traders chase dreams, operators outsmart the game, and finfluencers sell hope (and courses). SHARE BAZAAR: Yahaan Sabhi Gyaani Hain is a sharp, hilarious take on the madness behind the money.

programme.title: Rangdari
programme.desc: An interrogation between a cop and a criminal turns into a pre-planned crime.

programme.title: Something Like Love
programme.desc: Something like love is the story of Karan and Simran, who have perceived love differently all their lives. Karan's love language is poetry, and for Simran, if love isn't DDLJ, it isn't love.

programme.title: Saanjh
programme.desc: SAANJH tells the story of Shyam and Sandhya, childhood friends who meet for the last time. Shyam loves Sandhya, but she sees him only as a friend. We surprisingly learn that Shyam is actually struggling with mental disorder, and Sandhya is nothing but just in his imagination. Despite the calm riverbank setting, Shyam's inner struggles are evident. As Shyam faces reality, he realizes he must accept things as they are, showing the power of love and understanding ourselves.

programme.title: Samaapan
programme.desc: This is the story of a Pandit, Tribhu Pandey. One day while returning from a funeral feast comes across a mysterious skull in the forest with many secrets.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Office
programme.desc: A young woman is feeling uncomfortable around older male colleagues who are treating her unfairly. She seeks help from HR but does not receive the support she needs. She wonders why she is always the one being blamed and considers ways to address the situation and overcome it

programme.title: Pilibhit
programme.desc: Inspired by true stories, Siraj, a righteous, impoverished flute maker, resides at the edge of the forests of Pilibhit, North India, where man-eating tigers thrive. His mounting livelihood pressures and tragedies corner him to take a drastic measure that threatens to tear down his values and a loved one.

programme.title: Shiva
programme.desc: A narrative following a young boy from the Potraj community, who confronts his stepfather, urging him to conform to tradition rather than pursue his aspiration of education and a brighter future. It underscores Shiva's resilience and support system as he strives to fulfill his dreams against all odds.

programme.title: Passbook
programme.desc: Set in the 90's when ATM and instant money transfer were still many years far away. In order to withdraw money people had to rely on a lengthy process of MT or Money Transfer which contained a bank to bank secret code.

programme.title: Scooter
programme.desc: Aniket an entrepreneur is in his hometown, coming after a very long time. Trying to sell his father's home. After spending few hours in that house he goes back into his childhood memories. Aniket as a young boy was very stubborn. This time he was stuck up on a car. Like his many friends, he also wanted to have a car for his family, instead, his father buys a Scooter. He feels very humiliated and refuses to go by it. The story portrays a basic 90s FatherSon relationship

programme.title: Live A Little Part 2
programme.desc: After 5 years, Nimisha and Atish meet again at a party. She is awarded Best Emerging Entrepreneur by none other than Atish. Atish couldn't let another day go by without confronting Nimisha. Both seem happy and has moved on in their lives until they realize they've been living in a delusion. They reminded each other of their Pact which was made 5 years ago. Live a Little . Then made sudden plans which led to unexpected confessions which led to the most memorable night of their lives.

programme.title: Prison
programme.desc: Mini undergoes an assault, and shortly thereafter, her tormentors meet a grim fate. Stricken with fear and disbelief over these uncanny coincidences, Mini questions the source of these events. Could it be her confidante Bini, or something else entirely?

programme.title: Pintu
programme.desc: In a single day, young Pintu skips school, dreams of a better life inspired by a wealthy boy's shoes, and confronts the harsh realities of his underprivileged world, revealing his family's struggles and his own fragile hopes for the future.

programme.title: Salwate
programme.desc: The tale of a mother and son trapped in a challenging home situation and how a straightforward life tip helped them escape their predicament.

programme.title: Makdee
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman whose captivating beauty lures men into her world, much like a spider weaving an irresistible web

programme.title: Panch Din
programme.desc: A Married couple meets in a cafe to take divorce but coincidentally their common friend meets them and reminds them of something which might make a shift to their minds.

programme.title: Ransom Handsome
programme.desc: Ayan and Kabir are small time criminals involved in the kidnapping of a daughter of a dangerous mob boss, Nicole. All they have to do is stick to a kidnapping checklist and check off items as they come to pass. But their novice actions force them to interact with Nicole. Her innocent interactions result in a significantly jacked up ransom amount. Nicole manipulates the situation. Ayan and Kabir struggle to survive as Nicole starts executing her master plan to leave no witnesses behind

programme.title: Party Bhaiya Viral Hai
programme.desc: A satirical comedy on social media, Party Bhaiya follows a young man from a small village who becomes infatuated with a social media influencer through her videos. Drawn by his growing attraction, he tracks down her location to express his feelings in person. However, this encounter delivers a jarring reality check, revealing the stark differences between her online persona and real life. But in the unpredictable world of social media, surprises await, and Party Bhaiya, his online alias, learns that appearances can be deceiving.

programme.title: Chumbak
programme.desc: "Chumbak" follows Aryan and Mitisha, once inseparable lovers, who reunite after years. The old flame reignites, but life has diverged their paths. Caught between duty and desire, they must navigate tough choices, testing their love against the changed tides of circumstance. A poignant tale of love's resilience in the face of reality.

programme.title: Qurbat
programme.desc: In a stormy night, tension unfolds in the affluent household of Akram and Noorie, a middle-aged couple. Abdul, their seventy years old servant and his young petite wife Fatima share the space. Each resident of the household is driven by their dark desires. The morbid darkness of the night hides the truth in that household. Qurbat is a dark psychological thriller involving these two women who draw close for their respective liberation.

programme.title: Pardesi Love
programme.desc: The central theme of "Pardesi Love" focuses on a romance involving an Indian taxi driver and a foreign woman who arrives in India from Canada to meet her online boyfriend and fulfill her mother's final rites. However, the situation is far from straightforward. Jasmin intends to wed her boyfriend, Sunny, and establish a life in India, while simultaneously, the cab driver, Satya, develops feelings for her. Yet, the complexities of their relationships and interactions form the crux of the film's narrative, showcasing the dynamic among these three individuals.

programme.title: Ode To The Nameless
programme.desc: A 24-year-old man, struggling with societal pressure to have his first intimate experience, decides to hire a companion. Contrary to his expectations, the encounter is awkward and guilt-ridden, leading to bouts of anxiety. Surprisingly, the woman, mature beyond her years, guides him with ease and grace, helping him realize that what he was searching for couldn't be found in just a few moments of pleasure.

programme.title: Sita Ram Chaddha
programme.desc: Sita Ram Chaddha's married daughter has the option to seek substantial financial assistance from her affluent brother, but her unique request ends up transforming the lives of everyone involved in unexpected and remarkable ways.

programme.title: The Last Date
programme.desc: A story of a husband and wife who are enjoying a romantic dinner date together that ends with a tragic climax.

programme.title: Soul For Sole
programme.desc: The real essence of life is found in serving others. A regular postman, with little else in his world but his job, faithfully delivers letters throughout his challenging life. One day, an unexpected encounter offers him a new purpose to live

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: One evening, Dhirendra (40 yrs.) is eager to head home, yet the taxi driver is awaiting additional passengers. Eventually, a lone passenger arrives, prompting the taxi to proceed. As the driver requests fares and mentions a lack of change, a comedic spectacle ensues between the passengers and the driver. Ultimately, the narrative takes a humorous twist, concluding with a happy ending.

programme.title: U Equals To Me
programme.desc: Nikita and Neeraj know each other well, but their relationship feels awkward. Nikita finds Neeraj's touches repulsive. Aniket has proposed, but she can't let go of Neeraj. Why does she seem stuck between a rock and a hard place? What’s the matter with Neeraj? Is it some deficiency, disability or a disease? It would need a silver bullet to get them together. What if the silver bullet already exists, unknown to them?

programme.title: Tall Girlfriend Dates Short Guy
programme.desc: In this charming comedy, a couple navigates the ups and downs of their relationship, with him being shorter and her towering over him. From playful teasing by the maid to awkward encounters, his height becomes a source of humor and occasional frustration. However, amidst the laughs and challenges, her unwavering love reassures him that their bond transcends any physical differences. Join them on a delightful journey of love and laughter, where acceptance triumphs over insecurities.

programme.title: The Red Suitcase
programme.desc: A lone taxi driver’s quiet routine is shattered when she picks up a seemingly innocent passenger carrying a RED suitcase. What begins as a simple ride turns into a twisted journey, as the driver uncovers chilling clues hidden inside the suitcase that lead her into the dark mystery. She must navigate the gritty streets and her growing paranoia to survive a night that will change everything.

programme.title: Unfinished Business
programme.desc: A mother’s unwavering love gives her child the strength to face fears, embrace courage, and discover the true meaning of freedom. This inspiring tale celebrates the power of love, resilience, and the journey toward self-discovery.

programme.title: Wazir
programme.desc: A crime thriller that showcases the tale of an impeccably executed murder, where the culprits cleverly evade justice through meticulous planning and a lack of incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Taashe
programme.desc: Shiv Kothari, a village boy of 8 years is not at all interested to learn taashe (a musical instrument ), his family, and his ancestral business. What changes him so suddenly that he becomes keen to learn taashe. Who changes him so much that he decides to play taashe professionally. Watch a unique love and marriage story of two kids

programme.title: Vinyamswaha
programme.desc: You will take me for a ride in the sky, Vinay, when you become a pilot." These words have haunted Vinay throughout his life like a fearful shadow. Born into a Brahmin family, Vinay fell in love with a Valmiki girl. However, representatives of the caste-driven society, cloaked in prejudice, turned his love into a vile and grotesque joke. Today, Vinay is serving a life sentence for the rape and murder of his own girlfriend.

programme.title: Ravan Chhaya
programme.desc: Ravan-Chhaya" is a poignant short film that delves into the struggle to preserve Indian culture and traditions amidst the relentless tide of Western influence and modernization. Set in the culturally rich state of Odisha, the story revolves around the fading art form of Ravan-Chhaya, a traditional shadow puppetry style that once thrived in the region but is now on the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Thanks Mom
programme.desc: Thanks Mom is a human & a universal story of every mother & son that will melt your hearts away. The film's strength is its emotional value and connectivity to the viewers. It is the most honest & truest form of interpretation of a mother's role. It highlights a mom-son connection that is frayed and rough around the edges, filled with awkward silences and unsaid feelings that both find difficult to navigate but come around for each other when the time comes.

programme.title: Zindagi Ek Kashmakash
programme.desc: Zindagi Ek Kashmakash is a heart-wrenching story of a single mother, Rani, who has been abandoned by his boyfriend. Rani makes a living as a prostitute to support her only son, Ajay. Despite the harsh reality of her life, Rani is determined to provide a better future for Ajay. As Ajay grows older, he begins to worry that something is not quite right with his mother's job.

programme.title: Uljhan
programme.desc: After an unresolved breakup, Kartik and Ishita reunite for one last conversation. As memories resurface, so do the feelings. But closure doesn’t always mean getting back together. Uljhan is a tender tale of emotional maturity, heartbreak, and growth.

programme.title: Parinay
programme.desc: The narrative explores our thought processes, whose opinions we value, and how we handle a common issue faced by many couples: when a minor disagreement escalates into a pointless argument.

programme.title: The Apple
programme.desc: Story of two kids and how their life coincides whilst exchanging an Apple. The story reflects the societal dichotomy under the same sky in a small town near Delhi. The film is Accredited in the British Council Global Film directory and quoted by BBC as an "absolutely brilliant thought-provoking film.

programme.title: The Last Act
programme.desc: "THE LAST ACT" follows Chitra, a method actor known for her ability to fully immerse herself into any role. However, as she prepares for her latest performance, she begins to lose touch with reality, seamlessly transitioning between characters and struggling to discern where her performances end and her true self begins.

programme.title: Uyire
programme.desc: 'Uyire' explores the feeling of Love & how differently it is perceived from its actual implied meaning, whilst being a social commentary on the class system that is habitually rooted in Urban cities. Indrajit & Zoya, two contrasting individuals try to find a space where both of them feel respected. The film explores how an individual's upbringing, background, class, responsibilities, shapes their mindset, which ultimately leave Indrajit & Zoya at a stage of uncertainty.

programme.title: The Perception
programme.desc: This story follows the journey of a professional photographer and a poor cycle rickshaw driver in Mumbai at the end of spring. Through various incidents on the road, their perceptions of each other change, highlighting the contrast between their social statuses. Ultimately, their experiences weave together to create a beautiful narrative of understanding and connection.

programme.title: Prowl
programme.desc: A young girl pays a visit to a mysterious stranger after connecting with him through a dating site. What follows is either a cautionary tale or a parable, based on how you view it.

programme.title: Woh Khaas
programme.desc: A business tycoon bored with his monotonous work-life escapes from his corporate setup for a day and ends up meeting a girl, who like a dream changes him upside down in a real ‘Filmy Manner’. Woh Khaas is a jazzy tribute to Bollywood romances that tries to combine the reality of love and the flamboyance of Indian cinema in an entertaining and enriching way.

programme.title: Trp
programme.desc: A victims father tries to get justice for his daughter despite the failed situation system in place.

programme.title: Uljhe Ho Kyun
programme.desc: Fitness influencer Abhay’s quirky habit of messaging his first likes leads him to Srishti, a corporate workaholic. As sparks fly, their contrasting worlds collide in a playful yet unpredictable romance. Will their chemistry sizzle or turn to ashes? A fun, fiery take on modern love.

programme.title: Writer
programme.desc: A quiet evening between a writer and his wife unravels into a surreal exploration of love, memory, and hidden truths. As reality shifts, so do the stories they’ve been telling themselves—and each other.

programme.title: The Decision
programme.desc: The Struggle of a Female Actress in the Film Industry: A young woman faces difficulties when working with a demanding director who creates a stressful environment. She expresses her concerns to the producer, but he reacts angrily and uses harsh language toward her. Will the actress decide to find a way to work together or stand up for herself?

programme.title: Humraz
programme.desc: This is the story of a couple who tried to raise their voice against the undesirable practice of one community. Hamraz is a witness to the hero playing Ravanahatha and the incidents that happened to him... Sometimes the image that looks white is also black... Humraz is a story full of mysteries... The curtain will soon fall on all the secrets and the real story will come out in front of everyone..

programme.title: Silence Please
programme.desc: Kartik and Radhika are college best friends. They’re close, share everything, and go to each other for both approvals and advice. But Kartik just found out some very upsetting news that Radhika hid from him. Will their friendship make it through?

programme.title: Second First Date
programme.desc: Ishaan and Fiza's story began over a phone screen. After 4 months, Fiza has finally 'dared' to surprise Ishaan, and they had their first, no wait…second…umm actually, they had a second first date! Would it be awkward or unforgettable?

programme.title: Half Half
programme.desc: From tiffins to secrets — Mansi and Sharan used to share everything as kids. They were those friends who were teased as “girlfriend-boyfriend”, even before they knew what love is. Now, 6 years later, Sharan is on his way to become “famous-shamous”. And Mansi? Well, she just hopes that some things haven’t changed.

programme.title: Jinx
programme.desc: Jenny has paid a surprise visit to Mira’s house to help her through a difficult breakup. But Mira is not happy with this intrusion. Will Jenny find a way to comfort her best friend?

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: At 60, Mr. Mehta is about to give his life’s biggest interview. But his interviewer Malvika isn’t too happy with his answers. Everything depends on this. Will Mr. Mehta make it through?

programme.title: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Why did Cathy run away from her own baby shower? Her husband Tejas tries to figure out what’s really on her mind. Can they still celebrate their big day, their way?

programme.title: Bae
programme.desc: A thirteen year old is stuck with her masi who is single this Valentine’s Day AGAIN! How will these two get through the clichés and romance that surround them today?

programme.title: Not Out
programme.desc: Abhay & Sid have been playing cricket almost every Saturday for the last 20 years. But today, Abhay has some news that may change this ritual — and their friendship — forever.

programme.title: Wingmama
programme.desc: Akshi is upset that her mother stalked her on Instagram. But is that the real reason why she’s disappointed or the fact that her mother knows something she wasn’t supposed to find out in the first place?

programme.title: Third Wheel
programme.desc: Samaa and Ira have been best friends for 3 years. And it gets a bit tricky when Samaa has to compete for Ira's time and attention with a recent love interest in Ira's life.

programme.title: Kebab Mein Haddi
programme.desc: Gaurav has planned yet another perfect date for his long-time girlfriend Vaani, — at the same spot where they went on their first-ever camping trip! Two small problems though: (1) She is not here, and (2) Someone else he just can't get along with is here, instead of her. What will Gaurav do when his forever Kabab Mein Haddi is being extra clingy today?

programme.title: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Why did Cathy run away from her own baby shower? Her husband Tejas tries to figure out what’s really on her mind. Can they still celebrate their big day, their way?

programme.title: Weekends
programme.desc: Tara may have a problem leaving her comfort zone but not all things have to have practical solutions right like Raghav thinks, right? Maybe some things are just meant to be felt…unless there’s an eviction notice over your head!

programme.title: Suno
programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: The Last Bencher
programme.desc: Vishal and Niki have always been project partners since the first year of college. He is the topper and she, the last bencher. Their last project before their virtual graduation is due. Can a topper and last bencher be nothing more than just project partners?

programme.title: Kheer
programme.desc: As we age, life can get lonelier and the definition of relationships, mature. Kheer is a delightful serving of love and companionship where secrets get accidentally spilt and shared.

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Kebab Mein Haddi
programme.desc: Gaurav has planned yet another perfect date for his long-time girlfriend Vaani, — at the same spot where they went on their first-ever camping trip! Two small problems though: (1) She is not here, and (2) Someone else he just can't get along with is here, instead of her. What will Gaurav do when his forever Kabab Mein Haddi is being extra clingy today?

programme.title: Agli Baar
programme.desc: Today, the slum-dwellers have managed to stall the illegal demolition of their shanties. Tomorrow, they must take their non-violent fight for justice to the high court. Tonight, someone is making sure that never happens, one deathly scream at a time.

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: Haba Goba
programme.desc: Getting intimate takes a lot of planning in "these times". Nandini and Kush have done all that and more for their "special" date. But will things go as smoothly as planned? Or will there be bumps along the way?

programme.title: Kaande Pohe
programme.desc: Kaande Pohe - A Maharashtrian snack traditionally served when a boy visits a girls' family for the first time in an arranged marriage set up. The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: El'ayichi
programme.desc: What happens when you have a dead but clingy husband, an irritated wife, and a fossilized dodo in the same house? Experience love, way past its 'expiry' date.

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Half Half
programme.desc: From tiffins to secrets — Mansi and Sharan used to share everything as kids. They were those friends who were teased as “girlfriend-boyfriend”, even before they knew what love is. Now, 6 years later, Sharan is on his way to become “famous-shamous”. And Mansi? Well, she just hopes that some things haven’t changed.

programme.title: Ved And Arya
programme.desc: Arya turns up unannounced at Ved’s home on a Friday night. Ved knows it's not just a regular surprise and that Arya has something else on her mind. Will all go down exactly as planned?

programme.title: Not Out
programme.desc: Abhay & Sid have been playing cricket almost every Saturday for the last 20 years. But today, Abhay has some news that may change this ritual — and their friendship — forever.

programme.title: Mamta Tonic
programme.desc: A travelling saleswoman. 3 potential customers. She weighs the pros of her homemade tonic against the cons of making tough choices in life.

programme.title: Khujli
programme.desc: What happens when Girdharilal and Roopmati decide to scratch a 25-year-old itch? Secret desires come out, hidden fantasies are revealed, long-lost fire is rekindled, and things can’t help but get a little…kinky.

programme.title: Third Wheel
programme.desc: Samaa and Ira have been best friends for 3 years. And it gets a bit tricky when Samaa has to compete for Ira's time and attention with a recent love interest in Ira's life.

programme.title: Bhaiyya Morey
programme.desc: "His name is Sasha. Lost and found in this tamasha." On a long, dark night - a young rapper, Sasha is on his way to Goa when all of a sudden, his car breaks down. An old woman finds him stranded in the middle of nowhere and reluctantly agrees to help.

programme.title: Deuce
programme.desc: A mother and a son argue about love, insecurities and acceptance around an intense match of table tennis. Who wins? Who loses? Watch Deuce.

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Wingmama
programme.desc: Akshi is upset that her mother stalked her on Instagram. But is that the real reason why she’s disappointed or the fact that her mother knows something she wasn’t supposed to find out in the first place?

programme.title: Kashmir
programme.desc: A bereaved son grapples with his loss and in turn understands his relationship with himself. Kashmir is an introspective dialogue between a person and a distant place you call home.

programme.title: Cuddly
programme.desc: Necessity is the mother of invention. But can it replace mother's love?

programme.title: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Why did Cathy run away from her own baby shower? Her husband Tejas tries to figure out what’s really on her mind. Can they still celebrate their big day, their way?

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: The Day After
programme.desc: A loved one goes missing and panic strikes. 'The Day After' takes you on a journey that's bigger than you can imagine.

programme.title: Silence Please
programme.desc: Kartik and Radhika are college best friends. They’re close, share everything, and go to each other for both approvals and advice. But Kartik just found out some very upsetting news that Radhika hid from him. Will their friendship make it through?

programme.title: Kaande Pohe
programme.desc: Kaande Pohe - A Maharashtrian snack traditionally served when a boy visits a girls' family for the first time in an arranged marriage set up. The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: Bunny
programme.desc: A girl and a guy pop sleeping pills around a bonfire. You won't believe what happens next.

programme.title: Kaande Pohe
programme.desc: Kaande Pohe - A Maharashtrian snack traditionally served when a boy visits a girls' family for the first time in an arranged marriage set up. The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Life After
programme.desc: Before we draw the curtain on Breast Cancer Awareness Month, let's shed some light on those who battle it with every little that makes life worth loving, and living. We salute the undying courage in the face of adversity.

programme.title: Ved And Arya
programme.desc: Arya turns up unannounced at Ved’s home on a Friday night. Ved knows it's not just a regular surprise and that Arya has something else on her mind. Will all go down exactly as planned?

programme.title: Arre Baba
programme.desc: Little Devika has a problem her father may not understand. Does she miss having a mother?

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: Deuce
programme.desc: A mother and a son argue about love, insecurities and acceptance around an intense match of table tennis. Who wins? Who loses? Watch Deuce.

programme.title: El'ayichi
programme.desc: What happens when you have a dead but clingy husband, an irritated wife, and a fossilized dodo in the same house? Experience love, way past its 'expiry' date.

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Banana Bread
programme.desc: Shruti is home alone during the pandemic when the arrival of someone redefines what's acceptable in a time of Distancing. A sweet, tender little film which reveals different flavours as you savour it. (Take a bite!)

programme.title: Kashmir
programme.desc: A bereaved son grapples with his loss and in turn understands his relationship with himself. Kashmir is an introspective dialogue between a person and a distant place you call home.

programme.title: R.i.p
programme.desc: Two old men wake up to the same matrimonial ad in the morning paper. What follows is something totally unexpected. After all, it's never too late to find love!

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: Suno
programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: Kheer
programme.desc: As we age, life can get lonelier and the definition of relationships, mature. Kheer is a delightful serving of love and companionship where secrets get accidentally spilt and shared.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 10 years ago, a boy abandoned his alcoholic mother. Now a man, he returns to meet her.

programme.title: Bapu
programme.desc: A picturesque slice of life drama - Bapu - tracks the journey of an apprentice postman turned good samaritan in the bylanes of present-day Kolkata, when he chances upon archived letters addressed to Mahatma Gandhi by a common man - a man who has been sending the same letter to the Mahatma for the last few years.

programme.title: Agli Baar
programme.desc: Today, the slum-dwellers have managed to stall the illegal demolition of their shanties. Tomorrow, they must take their non-violent fight for justice to the high court. Tonight, someone is making sure that never happens, one deathly scream at a time.

programme.title: Half Of My Heart
programme.desc: Tasha and Raghav have broken up. Again. If you've been in love, you know sometimes, it takes nothing to have the biggest fight. Half her things are there with him, and half of his - misplaced. And all of this in the middle of a national lockdown.

programme.title: Rear View
programme.desc: Between 'Start Trip' and 'End Trip' there’s a journey that can potentially change lives, if only we open up and not let technology come in the way of human connection.

programme.title: Kashmir
programme.desc: A bereaved son grapples with his loss and in turn understands his relationship with himself. Kashmir is an introspective dialogue between a person and a distant place you call home.

programme.title: The Last Day
programme.desc: Two roommates, on the night one of them is moving out after 8 years of staying together. What do they really want to say to each other in the final few minutes? Can they say it all?

programme.title: Life After
programme.desc: Before we draw the curtain on Breast Cancer Awareness Month, let's shed some light on those who battle it with every little that makes life worth loving, and living. We salute the undying courage in the face of adversity.

programme.title: Khujli
programme.desc: What happens when Girdharilal and Roopmati decide to scratch a 25-year-old itch? Secret desires come out, hidden fantasies are revealed, long-lost fire is rekindled, and things can’t help but get a little…kinky.

programme.title: Weekends
programme.desc: Tara may have a problem leaving her comfort zone but not all things have to have practical solutions right like Raghav thinks, right? Maybe some things are just meant to be felt…unless there’s an eviction notice over your head!

programme.title: Upgrade
programme.desc: What happens when Safa a successful, well-to-do, married woman is tempted to open a window to her past and meet her ex-boyfriend Maaz on Valentine’s Day?

programme.title: The Last Clue
programme.desc: It’s Zoey’s 16th birthday, and Samar seems to have forgotten. How can he, after all this time?! Growing up in the same housing complex, going to each other’s birthday parties as a kid? It’s a little different this time. They’re staying home, and they haven’t met in a while. And there may be newly blossoming feelings involved on either side... Did Samar forget, or is this birthday going to be the most memorable one?

programme.title: The Last Bencher
programme.desc: Vishal and Niki have always been project partners since the first year of college. He is the topper and she, the last bencher. Their last project before their virtual graduation is due. Can a topper and last bencher be nothing more than just project partners?

programme.title: The Last Surprise
programme.desc: Yash and Tara are meeting for their first date in this 'new normal.' He is cautious, she is just happy to be free and out in the open again. But she doesn't quite know what he has in store for her. Can dating in this new world feel like the old times? Will she feel the butterflies again after this long?

programme.title: Silence Please
programme.desc: Kartik and Radhika are college best friends. They’re close, share everything, and go to each other for both approvals and advice. But Kartik just found out some very upsetting news that Radhika hid from him. Will their friendship make it through?

programme.title: Second First Date
programme.desc: Ishaan and Fiza's story began over a phone screen. After 4 months, Fiza has finally 'dared' to surprise Ishaan, and they had their first, no wait…second…umm actually, they had a second first date! Would it be awkward or unforgettable?

programme.title: Half Half
programme.desc: From tiffins to secrets — Mansi and Sharan used to share everything as kids. They were those friends who were teased as “girlfriend-boyfriend”, even before they knew what love is. Now, 6 years later, Sharan is on his way to become “famous-shamous”. And Mansi? Well, she just hopes that some things haven’t changed.

programme.title: Jinx
programme.desc: Jenny has paid a surprise visit to Mira’s house to help her through a difficult breakup. But Mira is not happy with this intrusion. Will Jenny find a way to comfort her best friend?

programme.title: The Big Break
programme.desc: At 60, Mr. Mehta is about to give his life’s biggest interview. But his interviewer Malvika isn’t too happy with his answers. Everything depends on this. Will Mr. Mehta make it through?

programme.title: Baby Shower
programme.desc: Why did Cathy run away from her own baby shower? Her husband Tejas tries to figure out what’s really on her mind. Can they still celebrate their big day, their way?

programme.title: Bae
programme.desc: A thirteen year old is stuck with her masi who is single this Valentine’s Day AGAIN! How will these two get through the clichés and romance that surround them today?

The day is called 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'. There is no data on this strategy's success rate. Meet Sanjay and Manisha who are on their 'Kaande Pohe Cha Kaaryakaram'.

programme.title: Bunny
programme.desc: A girl and a guy pop sleeping pills around a bonfire. You won't believe what happens next.

programme.title: Haba Goba
programme.desc: Getting intimate takes a lot of planning in "these times". Nandini and Kush have done all that and more for their "special" date. But will things go as smoothly as planned? Or will there be bumps along the way?

programme.title: Half Of My Heart
programme.desc: Tasha and Raghav have broken up. Again. If you've been in love, you know sometimes, it takes nothing to have the biggest fight. Half her things are there with him, and half of his - misplaced. And all of this in the middle of a national lockdown.

programme.title: Arre Baba
programme.desc: Little Devika has a problem her father may not understand. Does she miss having a mother?

programme.title: Dry Day
programme.desc: How do you connect a bond that's broken? 'Dry Day' strives to blur the thin line that separates two men, across generations.

programme.title: Cuddly
programme.desc: Necessity is the mother of invention. But can it replace mother's love?

programme.title: One Day Mataram
programme.desc: One Day Mataram' is a light-hearted take on patriotism in modern times, showcasing a day in the life of an urban man who's out to prove his love for the country. In short, the man is patriotic, and his Facebook wall proves it. Jai Hind.

programme.title: Kheer
programme.desc: As we age, life can get lonelier and the definition of relationships, mature. Kheer is a delightful serving of love and companionship where secrets get accidentally spilt and shared.

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Rear View
programme.desc: Between 'Start Trip' and 'End Trip' there’s a journey that can potentially change lives, if only we open up and not let technology come in the way of human connection.

programme.title: The Last Day
programme.desc: Two roommates, on the night one of them is moving out after 8 years of staying together. What do they really want to say to each other in the final few minutes? Can they say it all?

programme.title: Cuddly
programme.desc: Necessity is the mother of invention. But can it replace mother's love?

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Breaking up ≠ getting over someone right? ‘Yesterday’ is a window into the most emotionally eventful 24 hours that Gautam has had in years.

programme.title: Mamta Tonic
programme.desc: A travelling saleswoman. 3 potential customers. She weighs the pros of her homemade tonic against the cons of making tough choices in life.

programme.title: The Day After
programme.desc: A loved one goes missing and panic strikes. 'The Day After' takes you on a journey that's bigger than you can imagine.

programme.title: Khujli
programme.desc: What happens when Girdharilal and Roopmati decide to scratch a 25-year-old itch? Secret desires come out, hidden fantasies are revealed, long-lost fire is rekindled, and things can’t help but get a little…kinky.

programme.title: Dry Day

programme.title: One Faith
programme.desc: Sometimes, all it takes for a melting pot to turn into a blazing furnace is a mere spark. Especially in a country like ours, where multiple faiths co-exist and cross paths every day. This is the day in the life of India, where two dominant forces face-off in a battle of who-blinks-first. And only one faith will triumph.

programme.title: Life After
programme.desc: Before we draw the curtain on Breast Cancer Awareness Month, let's shed some light on those who battle it with every little that makes life worth loving, and living. We salute the undying courage in the face of adversity.

programme.title: Ved And Arya
programme.desc: Arya turns up unannounced at Ved’s home on a Friday night. Ved knows it's not just a regular surprise and that Arya has something else on her mind. Will all go down exactly as planned?

programme.title: Arre Baba
programme.desc: Little Devika has a problem her father may not understand. Does she miss having a mother?

programme.title: Jai Mata Di
programme.desc: Mumbai is a funny city. Call it a melting pot, the glamour capital, or simply the most open and safe place to be around. But when it comes to two people living under the same roof without a marriage certificate, it’s not religion, caste, or even the parents that’s the biggest hurdle. It’s a species that dictates the law of the land without really owning it. The Society Secretary. But as they say, there’s nothing mom can’t solve. With that belief on the one hand, and a funny bone in the other, we say Jai Mata Di!

programme.title: Naamkaran
programme.desc: When it comes to new beginnings, families have a way of always being there. Sometimes it's as simple as a good- morning forward. But for Jay, it's something slightly more dramatic. Watch Naamkaran, as Jay and his (uninvited) family take on a new challenge.

programme.title: Deuce
programme.desc: A mother and a son argue about love, insecurities and acceptance around an intense match of table tennis. Who wins? Who loses? Watch Deuce.

programme.title: El'ayichi
programme.desc: What happens when you have a dead but clingy husband, an irritated wife, and a fossilized dodo in the same house? Experience love, way past its 'expiry' date.

programme.title: L
programme.desc: A mother's dream of riding a scooter is not as easy as it seems.

programme.title: Banana Bread
programme.desc: Shruti is home alone during the pandemic when the arrival of someone redefines what's acceptable in a time of Distancing. A sweet, tender little film which reveals different flavours as you savour it. (Take a bite!)

programme.title: Kashmir
programme.desc: A bereaved son grapples with his loss and in turn understands his relationship with himself. Kashmir is an introspective dialogue between a person and a distant place you call home.

programme.title: R.i.p
programme.desc: Two old men wake up to the same matrimonial ad in the morning paper. What follows is something totally unexpected. After all, it's never too late to find love!

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Aamad
programme.desc: "Aamad" in essence is the story of a father and son and their shared inheritance of loss. An inheritance that tears them apart and yet binds them together. Abhay returns home to find his father on his deathbed. Old painful memories resurface. Will he be able to make amends for the faults of his past? As his father passes on, will this be Abhay’s rites of passage? Will Abhay heed the call of the bloodline, despite the tinkering strains of the past?

programme.title: Suno
programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: Kheer
programme.desc: As we age, life can get lonelier and the definition of relationships, mature. Kheer is a delightful serving of love and companionship where secrets get accidentally spilt and shared.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: 10 years ago, a boy abandoned his alcoholic mother. Now a man, he returns to meet her.

programme.title: Bapu
programme.desc: A picturesque slice of life drama - Bapu - tracks the journey of an apprentice postman turned good samaritan in the bylanes of present-day Kolkata, when he chances upon archived letters addressed to Mahatma Gandhi by a common man - a man who has been sending the same letter to the Mahatma for the last few years.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Out Of Death
programme.desc: From the producers of The Irishman & Lone Survivor comes this thrilling story of Jack Harris (Bruce Willis) who must tap into his killer instincts to survive the wilderness and the human predators as he tries to help a woman who witnesses a crime and finds herself running from a rural mountain town's corrupt police department after she took a video of police killing a drug dealer.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Bad Samaritan
programme.desc: Bad Samaritan is a terrifying thriller of two young car valets who use their business as a front to burglarize houses of customers while they eat. Their lives are turned upside down when they rob the home of a demented serial killer after making a shocking discovery of a woman being held captive. They must choose to run and hide, or face the killer whose dark secrets they have just exposed.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Regeneration
programme.desc: Terrorists kidnap the Russian Prime Minister's two kids, take Chernobyl Nuclear Power Plant and threaten to blow up a reactor. Four Universal Soldiers go in but are no match to a Next Generation UniSol. The world's only hope is to reactivate decommissioned Universal Soldier Luc Deveraux.

programme.title: Lawless
programme.desc: We control the fear, you understand? Without the fear, we are all good as dead.’ The notorious gangster Al Capone observed that “Prohibition has made nothing but trouble,” and “I am like any other man. All I do is supply a demand.” Acclaimed director delivers a thrillingly vivid slice of American outlaw history in his epic gangster tale, LAWLESS. LAWLESS is the true story of the infamous Bondurant Brothers: three bootlegging siblings who made a run for the American Dream in Prohibition-era Virginia. The film gathers an ensemble of gifted, dynamic new-generation stars – Tom Hardy, Shia LaBeouf, Jessica Chastain, Jason Clarke, Mia Wasikowska, Dane DeHaan – alongside two of the finest actors of their generations, Guy Pearce and Gary Oldman. A riveting, intense story of Crime and Corruption, Loyalty and Love, Brutality and Tenderness, LAWLESS is a rich addition to the American Gangster Canon.

programme.title: Spytime
programme.desc: Anacleto, a former secret agent, is forced to come out of retirement and protect his son, Adolfo, when his arch-enemy, Vazquez, breaks out of prison and targets him

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Redline is an auto/action thriller that features an extensive exotic car collection Phantom Rolls Royce, Lamborghini Murcielago, Enzo Ferrari, Ferrari F430, Ferrari Scaglietti and two Mercedes SLR McLaren AMGs. The film follows a gorgeous young automobile fanaticize driver who becomes part of illegal drag racing competitions organized by exotic car fanatics.

programme.title: Wrecker
programme.desc: Two beautiful young women taking a trip through the countryside, are terrorized by an unknown driver trying to run them down in a heavy duty tow truck.

programme.title: Haywire
programme.desc: From Academy Award-winning director Steven Soderbergh of Ocean’s 11, 12 & 13 comes HAYWIRE. A Female Assassin covert operative is hired to various global missions to perform jobs which governments can't authorize. When the operation goes awry, she needs to use all of her skills & tricks to escape an international manhunt and eliminate the last remaining link of the conspiracy against her.

programme.title: Universal Soldier: Day Of Reckoning
programme.desc: John awakens from a coma to discover his wife and daughter were murdered in a brutal home invasion. Haunted by images of the attack, he vows to kill the man responsible: The fight pits John against Andrew Scott and an army of genetically enhanced warriors; meanwhile, he must contend with a Uni Sol in relentless pursuit.

programme.title: Poseidon Rex
programme.desc: While searching for lost treasure, deep sea divers unleash a monster that causes havoc and destruction not only in sea but also on land.

programme.title: Tekken: Kazuya's Revenge
programme.desc: Suffering from amnesia, a young man trying to discover his true identity is kidnapped by an underground crime organization and turned into a ruthless assassin

programme.title: The Catcher Was A Spy
programme.desc: With an ensemble cast, this gripping, espionage thriller brings to life the true story of Moe Berg a World War II spy. His mission: go behind enemy lines in Europe to assassinate the Nazi's chief nuclear scientist before the Germans develop an atomic bomb. Berg must rely on his steel-trap intellect in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse - with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.

programme.desc: A complaint registered to the manufacturing company for a dead computer brings back nostalgia and surprises in the life of a retired school principle who is living a mundane life.

programme.title: Dum Dum Deega Deega
programme.desc: The solution to your problem is often hidden in the problem itself; all you need is a different outlook. The story of a beggar child, Ajju, who lives on the streets of Mumbai, but dreams big. He challenges his unfortunate fate, with nothing but a 'different outlook' towards the situation he faces.

programme.title: Make Her Happy
programme.desc: Nandita and Rahul are to be married soon. They are a live-in couple. Things take a U-turn when Rahul gets a call from his ex-girlfriend 'Suhana'. Will Rahul be able to save himself? Watch to find out who has trapped whom.

programme.title: Desh Ki Pardesh ?
programme.desc: The film follows the Parikh's on their visit to their children settled in the US. However, to only realize that there's a lot more than just a generation gap between them. Mainly, dawning upon Hasmuk Parikh's that it's great to dream big for your children, but one must be mentally prepared that those dreams may or not have them in it.

programme.title: Bhagwaan - The Faith
programme.desc: A final chance meeting with a mysterious old homeless man changes everything they’ve experienced that day. The story delves into how deep their faith truly is and how people worship gods. Some use faith and god as a means of solace while others as a crutch for a troubling life.

programme.title: Khujli

programme.desc: An experimental night in bed ends up with a mark for the world to see. As the world looks at the mark left in bed, the couple is forced to look inside themselves and their relationship.

programme.title: Family
programme.desc: Anvith's friend Karthik is leaving school and moving to another city as his parents are getting divorced. This news makes Anvith very sad. The reason for their divorce which Karthik reveals to Anvith is a regular heated argument between Karthik's parents. Then Anvith also starts noticing the same argument between his parents. So, Anvith decides to do everything right so that their parents don't fight, but end up ruining everything which leads to a more heated argument.

programme.title: Long Drive
programme.desc: Vikram, Zain and Aman are on a long drive together. But when Vikram takes an unexpected turn, his friends aren’t sure what to expect. Will they make it back in time? And does Vikram have something on his mind? Watch Long Drive to find out.

programme.title: Epicfail
programme.desc: It is difficult to understand the truth about Ramayana in today’s time as it gets lost in translation. This is a film about a young and passionate journalist discovering the truth about Sita.

programme.desc: What happens when you have a dead but clingy husband, an irritated wife, and a fossilized dodo in the same house? Experience love, way past its 'expiry' date.

programme.title: 10.30 Lets Go To School
programme.desc: Disha is an ordinary village girl with dreams like any other kid. Not only does she love her father unconditionally, but also her books and school. Life takes an unexpected turn when her Baba and Bua decide to discontinue their education. Her fate is about to meet that of thousands of other children who drop out of school every year. However, it is not so easy to give up. She is intelligent, confident and above all, determined to get back what she rightfully deserves, her right to dream!
